auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Winston AI API key used as a Bearer token in the Authorization header. Create or view API keys in the Winston AI developer dashboard at https://dev.gowinston.ai/.

actions.name: check_plagiarism
actions.description: Check text, a public document URL, or a public website URL for plagiarism with Winston AI.

text.description: The text to scan. Winston AI documents a minimum length for reliable results.

fileUrl.description: A publicly accessible PDF, DOC, or DOCX URL for Winston AI to scan.

websiteUrl.description: A publicly accessible website URL for Winston AI to scan.

language.description: A two-letter language code supported by the endpoint, or auto to let Winston AI detect it.

items.description: A domain or URL to exclude from the plagiarism score.

excluded_sources.description: Domains or URLs to exclude from the plagiarism score.

country.description: The country code of the country where the text was written.

inputSchema.description: Input for checking content plagiarism with Winston AI. Provide one of text, fileUrl, or websiteUrl.

status.description: The HTTP status code reported by Winston AI.

service.description: The Winston AI service name used for the request.

scanTime.description: The timestamp when the scan was conducted.

inputType.description: The input type scanned by Winston AI, such as text, file, or website.

language.description: The language detected for the scanned text.

scanInformation.description: Basic metadata about a Winston AI plagiarism scan.

score.description: The percentage of plagiarized content in the scanned text.

sourceCounts.description: The number of sources containing matching content.

textWordCounts.description: The total number of words in the scanned text.

totalPlagiarismWords.description: The total number of words identified as plagiarized.

result.description: Summary scores from a Winston AI plagiarism scan.

sources.description: Sources matched during the plagiarism scan.

attackDetected.description: Signals for zero-width space or homoglyph attacks detected in scanned text.

text.description: The input text used for the plagiarism scan.

similarWords.description: Similar words found in the input text.

citations.description: Sources cited in the provided text.

startIndex.description: The starting index of the plagiarized sequence.

endIndex.description: The ending index of the plagiarized sequence.

indexes.description: Plagiarism sequences found in the input text.

credits_used.description: The number of Winston AI credits used by the request.

credits_remaining.description: The number of Winston AI credits remaining after the request.

actions.name: compare_texts
actions.description: Compare two texts and return similarity signals from Winston AI.

second_text.description: The second text to compare against the first text.

inputSchema.description: Input for comparing two texts with Winston AI.

status.description: The HTTP status code reported by Winston AI.

similarity_score.description: Overall similarity score from 0 to 100 between the two texts.

first_text.description: Similarity details for the first compared text.

second_text.description: Similarity details for the second compared text.

credits_used.description: The number of Winston AI credits used by the request.

credits_remaining.description: The number of Winston AI credits remaining after the request.

outputSchema.description: The Winston AI text comparison response.

actions.name: detect_ai_text
actions.description: Detect whether text, a public document URL, or a public website URL was likely generated by AI with Winston AI.

text.description: The text to scan. Winston AI documents a minimum length for reliable results.

fileUrl.description: A publicly accessible PDF, DOC, or DOCX URL for Winston AI to scan.

websiteUrl.description: A publicly accessible website URL for Winston AI to scan.

language.description: A two-letter language code supported by the endpoint, or auto to let Winston AI detect it.

version.description: The Winston AI model version to use, such as 4.14 or latest.

sentences.description: Whether Winston AI should include sentence-level scores.

inputSchema.description: Input for detecting whether content was likely generated by AI with Winston AI. Provide one of text, fileUrl, or websiteUrl.

status.description: The HTTP status code reported by Winston AI.

score.description: Human score from 0 to 100. Lower values indicate AI-like text and higher values indicate human-like text.

sentences.description: Sentence-level score details returned by Winston AI.

input.description: The input type scanned by Winston AI, such as text, file, or website.

attack_detected.description: Signals for zero-width space or homoglyph attacks detected in scanned text.

credits_used.description: The number of Winston AI credits used by the request.

credits_remaining.description: The number of Winston AI credits remaining after the request.

version.description: The Winston AI model version used for the prediction.

language.description: The detected or specified language code.

outputSchema.description: The Winston AI AI text detection response.

actions.name: fact_check
actions.description: Verify claims in text, a public document URL, or a public website URL with Winston AI.

text.description: The text to scan. Winston AI documents a minimum length for reliable results.

fileUrl.description: A publicly accessible PDF, DOC, or DOCX URL for Winston AI to scan.

websiteUrl.description: A publicly accessible website URL for Winston AI to scan.

language.description: A two-letter language code supported by the endpoint, or auto to let Winston AI detect it.

inputSchema.description: Input for fact-checking content with Winston AI. Provide one of text, fileUrl, or websiteUrl.

status.description: The HTTP status code reported by Winston AI.

id.description: The unique identifier of the input sentence.

sentence.description: The exact input sentence from which the claim was extracted.

claim.description: The distinct claim checked by Winston AI.

verdict.description: The fact-checking verdict for the claim.

score.description: The confidence score from 0 to 100 for the verdict.

items.description: A fact-check result for a claim in the input text.

claims.description: Claims detected in the text with fact-checking results.

score.description: Overall confidence score from 0 to 100 that the provided text is accurate.

claimsCount.description: The number of claims extracted from the text.

text.description: The full original text that was analyzed.

input.description: The input type scanned by Winston AI, such as text, file, or website.

language.description: The detected or specified input language.

creditsUsed.description: The number of credits used to process the request.

creditsRemaining.description: The number of credits remaining for the account.

wordCount.description: The word count of the input text.
